    Interface IJsonEntity

    Represents the compiled metadata for a specific entity type, containing all its properties and mapping rules.

    Namespace: FluentJson.Core.Metadata
    Assembly: FluentJson.Core.dll
    Syntax
    public interface IJsonEntity
    Remarks

    Instances of this interface are deeply immutable and highly optimized for runtime reflection.

    Properties

    | Edit this page View Source

    ConstructorFactory

    Gets a pre-compiled expression factory to instantiate the entity without using GetUninitializedObject(Type).

    Declaration
    Func<object> ConstructorFactory { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    Func<object>
    Remarks

    This is the core piece that enables safe DDD instantiation with private parameterless constructors.

    | Edit this page View Source

    DerivedTypes

    Gets the read-only dictionary mapping discriminator values to their concrete derived types.

    Declaration
    IReadOnlyDictionary<object, Type> DerivedTypes { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    IReadOnlyDictionary<object, Type>
    | Edit this page View Source

    DiscriminatorPropertyName

    Gets the JSON property name used to discriminate derived types.

    Declaration
    string? DiscriminatorPropertyName { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    string
    | Edit this page View Source

    EntityType

    Gets the CLR type of the configured entity.

    Declaration
    Type EntityType { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    Type
    | Edit this page View Source

    Properties

    Gets the read-only list of configured properties and fields for this entity.

    Declaration
    IReadOnlyList<IJsonProperty> Properties { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    IReadOnlyList<IJsonProperty>
    | Edit this page View Source

    ShouldPreserveReferences

    Indicates whether circular references in this entity should be preserved during serialization.

    Declaration
    bool ShouldPreserveReferences { get; }
    Property Value
    Type Description
    bool
